releaseNotes:
Streaming UX and DeepSeek setup release.

Fixes:
- Assistant replies now render through a live character-level draft instead of appearing only after completion
- OpenAI-compatible and Anthropic streaming now surface reasoning/thinking deltas separately from final text
- Thinking output is shown while the model is reasoning and automatically collapses when final text starts
- DeepSeek is now available as a first-class default provider with https://api.deepseek.com and model presets
- Settings and first-run setup can fetch provider model lists and toggle DeepSeek 1M context suffix ([1m])
- Agent step budget is increased for longer multi-tool tasks while preserving resumable runs
